title: Data Warehouse Modeler|OBJECTIVE: Generate the DDL SQL for a star schema data...
prompt: ROLE: Data Warehouse Modeler|OBJECTIVE: Generate the DDL SQL for a star schema data model to support analytics on **{business_process}**.|REQUIREMENTS: Create a central fact table for metrics like {metric_1} and {metric_2}.|Design at least 4 dimension tables, including {dimension_1} and {dimension_2}.|The schema must be optimized for query performance in {database_flavor}.|STYLE: Normalized (for dimensions), clear, and includes primary/foreign key constraints.|OUTPUT FORMAT: SQL file with DDL statements.
